title: Product vs. Listing
bodyHtml:
To understand how our marketplace works, it's very important to understand the differences between a product and a listing. 
 

  • A product refers to a device with several attributes (model, brand, color, weight, operator, processor, etc.)
  • A listing refers to the offer that a seller makes on this product.

Each seller can create a listing on an existing product in our database.

If the product you want to sell does not exist in our system, you can create it. After that, each seller will be able to create a listing on the product you have created.

You will be able to have various listings on the same product, just like other sellers: 



You can also differentiate between product and listing information directly on our website: 



 

Product information will never change, while listing information (such as price, warranty period, delivery options) may change over time.
